value.fullName: Ballasted - Blocks used to resist active forces. No penetrations.
value.label: Ballasted - Blocks used to resist active forces. No penetrations.

value.fullName: Hybrid - Mix of anchors and ballast to resist active forces. Usually to meet load limits or seismic forces.
value.label: Hybrid - Mix of anchors and ballast to resist active forces. Usually to meet load limits or seismic forces.

value.fullName: Attached - Fully anchored to resist active forces. No ballast blocks.
value.label: Attached - Fully anchored to resist active forces. No ballast blocks.
